pack.name: Generator Maintenance
pack.description: Standby or portable generator inspection, exercise, and service reminders.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

entity_requirements.name: Generator runtime
entity_requirements.description: Optional runtime or power source that indicates the generator is running.

tasks.name: Exercise generator
tasks.description: Run the generator periodically according to the manufacturer instructions.
tasks.instructions: Run the generator safely outdoors or through its installed exercise cycle. Never operate a portable generator indoors.

tasks.name: Service generator after runtime
tasks.description: Change oil or perform runtime-based service after use.
tasks.instructions: Follow the generator manual for runtime-based oil, filter, spark plug, and inspection intervals.

tasks.name: Check generator fuel and battery
tasks.description: Inspect fuel condition and battery readiness.
tasks.instructions: Check fuel level/age, stabilizer needs, battery terminals, charger status, and transfer switch readiness where applicable.
